channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Former Epstein executive secretary tells Oversight panel he was 'master manipulator'
item.description: The House Oversight Committee is interviewing Jeffrey Epstein's executive secretary, Lesley Groff, as part of its ongoing inquiry into the DOJ's Epstein...

item.title: Many soccer fans excited about U.S. hosting World Cup, CBS News poll finds
item.description: The U.S. being a host country for the World Cup generates interest among fans, but less so among those who are not soccer fans.

item.title: Mortgage rates dos and don'ts that borrowers should know now
item.description: In today's unique economic climate, borrowers need to understand these four specific mortgage rate dos and don'ts.

item.title: Artemis III astronauts revealed for 'complex' NASA mission
item.description: Artemis III will launch the crew in the Orion spacecraft on top of the Space Launch System rocket in 2027, according to NASA.
